title: Payroll - Payrolling benefits
summaryBody: Supporting the payrolling of benefits in kind. Mandatory for UK payroll by April 2027, but also a high feature request.
detailBody: Supporting the payrolling of benefits in kind. Mandatory for UK payroll by April 2027, but also a high feature request.
